backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, product listings with categories, and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed branding updates changing 'Resoult'/'LocalMarket' to 'Resolt' across frontend files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS global styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with orange/amber theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Resolt' and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for browse and add-product pages, wrapped in shared layout with profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component rendering buttons to filter products by category or show all, with loading state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright for 'Resolt' and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper providing consistent Navigation header and Footer across all pages with flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Header navigation with 'Resolt' branding, authentication controls, and conditional 'Sell Item' button for logged-in users.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying product title, description, price in dollars, and category badge with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form for creating product listings with validation, category selection, price input, and submission handling with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProductGrid.tsx: Responsive grid layout rendering ProductCard components for an array of products.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal component that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name. Prevents closing until profile is created and uses form validation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control with admin token from URL params. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality. Creates AuthClient with configurable options and manages identity state throughout the application lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching categories, products, and user profiles, plus mutations for adding products and saving user profiles. All queries depend on the authenticated actor being available.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using an orange/amber color scheme. Defines design tokens for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AddProductPage.tsx: Protected page component for adding new products that redirects unauthenticated users to home. Renders ProductForm within a styled container with gradient background.
frontend/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx: Product browsing page with category filtering that displays all products or filtered by selected category. Shows loading states and empty states with appropriate messaging.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing. Includes sessionStorage persistence and functions to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, animations, and custom font families with Inter as the primary sans-serif font.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking three completed features that renamed branding from 'Resoult'/'LocalMarket' to 'Resolt' across index.html, Navigation.tsx, and Footer.tsx components.
